name: Jade Cargill [WWE]
description:
Jade Cargill (June 3, 1992) is an American professional wrestler and fitness model currently signed to World Wrestling Entertainment (WWE) on the SmackDown brand. She is previously signed to All Elite Wrestling (AEW).

Cargill has a daughter with her partner, MLB second baseman Brandon Phillips. Cargill has credited late female wrestler Chyna and X-Men character Storm as her inspirations.
creator: UnavRekno98
